title: INTERDICTION
doc_html:
CODE TITLE IX--OF PERSONS INCAPABLE OF ADMINISTERING

THEIR ESTATES, WHETHER ON ACCOUNT OF INSANITY

OR SOME OTHER INFIRMITY, AND OF THEIR INTERDICTION

AND CURATORSHIP

CHAPTER 1.  INTERDICTION

PART I.  INEBRIATES

§§1001-1004.  Repealed by Acts 2000, 1st Ex. Sess., No. 25, §4, eff. July 1, 2001.
